name: nerdywithme-tools
description: Trading tools, calculator shortcodes, and ad slot controls for the NerdyWithMe theme.

interface.shortDescription: Forex calculators and ad-slot controls for NerdyWithMe.
interface.longDescription: A companion plugin for the NerdyWithMe WordPress theme that adds forex calculators, tool routing, shortcode-powered utilities, and managed ad-slot controls.
defaultPrompt: Open the NerdyWithMe tools hub and explain which calculator fits this trading scenario.
Review the forex calculator setup and suggest improvements for pair-aware trade sizing.
Audit the theme and plugin package metadata before release.
